"[3] The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency. This request is for MULTIPLE PEOPLE. The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH. NO ONE is trapped. The person in need IS NOT injured. The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH. TCC or PSAP systems may garble this language's script. Return messages to the user will not be garbled. This concludes the initial data. Two-way text with the user is now available."
